name: open-token-exchange
description: Open Token Exchange — a secondary commodity & derivatives market for LLM inference tokens
comment:overrides: Pin a single React (19.2.3) across the workspace. Without this, npm auto-installs next's React peer as the latest (19.2.7) at the @ote/web level, conflicting with the hoisted 19.2.3 and making the production build bundle two React copies (breaks static prerender of /404 and /_error).
